title: Blank Type Icons (Cobblemon)
description: Blank type icons for the Cobblemon mod.
body:
Replaces the Cobblemon type icons with blank versions of themselves.

![Type Icons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/HN4PePAH/images/98f01296d4ff147e15dc290332d38a2a7572acdf.png)

![Type Icons in the Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/HN4PePAH/images/2169a71ad35108959709d1da3fbb311be37a8d2d.png)
